title: Marketing Graduate
description_snippet:
Brand Manager | Hybrid | Salary: €67,500




We're hiring on behalf of a leading global consumer goods company, renowned for its portfolio of iconic brands that touch billions of lives. This employer fosters a culture of internal promotion and robust employee development, emphasizing continuous learning and growth.




The Role

• Lead the master plans for product, commercial innovations, and marketing elements across all media.

• Develop strong marketing concepts and identify tactics based on consumer, shopper, and customer insights.

• Manage your own business from day one, putting ideas into practice.

• Work within Commercial Operations, Brand Operations, or Sales teams, depending on your skills and interests.

• Contribute to creating meaningful and sustainable brand experiences.
description_full:
Brand Manager | Hybrid | Salary: €67,500




We're hiring on behalf of a leading global consumer goods company, renowned for its portfolio of iconic brands that touch billions of lives. This employer fosters a culture of internal promotion and robust employee development, emphasizing continuous learning and growth.




The Role

• Lead the master plans for product, commercial innovations, and marketing elements across all media.

• Develop strong marketing concepts and identify tactics based on consumer, shopper, and customer insights.

• Manage your own business from day one, putting ideas into practice.

• Work within Commercial Operations, Brand Operations, or Sales teams, depending on your skills and interests.

• Contribute to creating meaningful and sustainable brand experiences.




What You'll Need

• Bachelor’s or Master’s degree with strong academic results.

• Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills.

• Demonstrated drive for leadership and a strong passion for Brand Management.

• Ability to work effectively with diverse groups, embracing creativity and innovation.

• Proficiency in English and a solid command of German.

• Less than 2 years of work experience after university graduation (excluding internships).




What's On Offer

• Exciting work with responsibility from day one.

• Competitive compensation package with annual performance reviews and a bonus.

• A permanent employment contract in a stable market.

• Comprehensive social benefits including flexible work, pension plan, and development support.
